article_meta.title: — News —Study Shows Pandemic Saw Rise In Firearm Injuries Among KidsBy Charlotte Pence Bond•Dec 20, 2022 DailyWire.com•F

reasoning: The model classifies the article as Lean Right with 0.72 confidence. The article is from Daily Wire (a Right-leaning outlet) and the author's framing choices do lean right — emphasizing pandemic effects rather than gun access, omitting gun control discussion entirely. The classification of Lean Right is reasonable (could arguably be Right given the source, but Lean Right is defensible given the largely factual reporting style). Most key_indicators reference author's editorial choices (framing, omissions, source selection) rather than quoted language. One indicator mentions a quote ('not doing a good job of taking care of families') from Dr. Kaufman, which is a minor attribution violation, though the indicator frames it as an inclusion choice. The confidence of 0.72 is reasonable for the moderate signals present.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: The article is from Daily Wire (Right-rated by AllSides). The author's framing choices — emphasizing pandemic effects, omitting gun control discussion, using 'disastrous effect of the pandemic' framing — suggest Right or Lean Right. Lean Right classification is one class off from Right at most, which is acceptable.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: 0.72 is reasonable but could be slightly higher given the clear editorial choices (omission of gun control framing, pandemic-blame framing, source being Daily Wire). The signals are moderately clear, so 0.72-0.80 range would be appropriate.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: Most indicators cite author's editorial choices: framing gun injuries as pandemic consequence, omitting gun control discussion, source selection. However, one indicator references Dr. Kaufman's quote ('not doing a good job of taking care of families') which is attributed language — a minor attribution violation. The phrase 'disastrous effect of the pandemic' is correctly identified as author's framing. Some indicators are somewhat vague rather than quoting exact phrases.
